perps-state.description: Perps controller state from live Redux store (activeProvider, isTestnet, positions, orders)

perps-positions.description: Live open perps positions via perpsGetPositions RPC

perps-balance.description: Live perps account state (totalBalance, unrealizedPnl, returnOnEquity) via perpsGetAccountState RPC

perps-orders.description: Live open perps limit/stop orders via perpsGetOpenOrders RPC

perps-provider.description: Active perps provider mode (hyperliquid | aggregated | myx)

perps-testnet.description: Whether perps is in testnet mode

perps-feature-flag.description: Check if perpsEnabledVersion remote flag is configured in manifest._flags
perps-feature-flag.expression: (async () => { const manifest = chrome.runtime.getManifest(); const flags = manifest._flags?.remoteFeatureFlags; return JSON.stringify(flags?.perpsEnabledVersion ?? null); })()

perps-markets.description: Live market data with prices via perpsGetMarketDataWithPrices RPC

perps-pre-trade.description: Pre-trade snapshot: positions + account state (capture before placing an order)

perps-post-trade.description: Post-trade snapshot: positions + account state (capture after order fills, compare with pre-trade)

perps-place-order.description: Place a perps order via perpsPlaceOrder RPC (template: requires symbol, side, amount params)

perps-connection-state.description: Live perps connection state via perpsGetConnectionState RPC, including call duration
